programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Eddie and her new partner, Maya (Yasha Thompson), clash with Jamie on the job when they fail to intervene in a public dispute at a convenience store.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Things get personal for Danny when Luis Delgado (Lou Diamond Phillips), the drug cartel hitman responsible for torching his house, resurfaces. Also, an attack on an officer in the line of duty directly impacts a member of Frank's team.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Erin and Frank clash over new legislation from the district attorney's office that undermines Frank's policies. Also, Erin is at odds with Governor Mendez (David Zayas) over questionable sex-trafficking laws.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When a video surfaces of cops being harassed by a group of people at a housing complex, Frank orders a raid to round up anyone with an outstanding warrant, against Garrett's (Gregory Jbara) advice.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: When a video surfaces of officers partaking in a clear case of entrapment, Frank focuses on finding the cop who leaked the video. Also, Eddie retaliates against a co-worker who is pranking Jamie.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank questions whether a run-in with community activists was an accident or a setup. Also, Jamie strives to rely less on Frank's input to makes decisions, Erin helps Anthony protect his daughter and ex-wife from a dangerous psychiatric patient.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After a former officer waits on Frank at a restaurant, he feels guilty about the circumstances surrounding why she was fired, and he tries to reinstate her.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: A medium approaches Danny and Baez claiming to know what happened to a woman who was found dead of an apparent suicide. Also, Jamie and Eddie help a woman who bought cheap insulin online that nearly killed her son.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: It's Reagan versus Reagan when Danny goes against Jamie's direct order during a hostage negotiation. Also, Nicky asks Erin for help when her friend is in jeopardy of losing his scholarship because of a crime he didn't commit.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: While off duty, Danny encounters a gas station robbery in progress and is forced to use his weapon, leaving him shaken and his family and co-workers concerned.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After a woman is murdered in her apartment, Danny and Baez turn to her daughter, Margo (Lyrica Okano), for help, but instead she complicates the investigation.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Frank's longtime friend Lenny reveals to him that an upcoming exposé will air some of the NYPD's dirty laundry. Also, Erin must decide how to charge a doctor whose experimental treatments led to the death of his terminally ill daughter.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After an incident where Officer Witten's (Lauren Patten) backup physically could not keep up with a chase, Frank must decide whether to implement a more rigorous fitness test for the NYPD.

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: After someone breaks into Luis Delgado's (Lou Diamond Phillips) home and kills his wife, Luis and Danny team up to take down the vicious murderer who may also be responsible for Linda's death.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: With a storm brewing, Adam takes refuge at a way station, run by cantankerous Jesse and his young grandaughter Marty, who yearns to see what exists away from the way station.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss helps Charlie and Will (Charlotte and Willomina), two young girls who just lost their father. They go on a journey to find their only nearby relative, Aunt Cloe.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss is seriously injured internally and Ben seeks help from the only doctor within 50 miles, who happens to be in prison for murder.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Adam's guitar-strumming friend, ranch hand Danny Morgan, is arrested on suspicion of murdering and robbing the Widow Baker.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Frank Medford, a figure from Ben's "wild, misspent youth", shows up in Virginia City, and though down on his luck, creates troubles for the Cartwrights by claiming to be a successful businessman.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A vain outlaw murders a man in front of witnesses, including Joe, but a clever lawyer is able to get him acquitted.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A stranger, Bob Jolly, arrives in Virginia City to accuse a drunken Judge Harry Whitaker of sending his innocent father, Carl, to the gallows.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: In this entertaining episode, laced with humor, Hoss first meets mountain man Jim Leyton. Bing Russell makes his first appearance as Deputy Clem Foster.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Joe becomes romantically involved with a woman who considers herself a serious dramatic actress. Unfortunately, she is the only one who does.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When Cochise falls on Joe, Ben cannot help but remember that is how Marie Cartwright was killed. He thinks back to meeting her in New Orleans in a rather confusing story not quite in synch with details discussed in "The First Born".

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: For a change, it is Adam rather than Joe who becomes mixed up in one of Hoss' funny exploits. Together they purchase a thoroughbred horse, and end up competing against their little brother in the big Virginia City race.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Adam takes a shine to Rebecca Kaufman, the daughter of a Jewish peddler, and bandits are convinced the Kaufman wagon is worth robbing.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss develops amnesia after being bushwhacked and hit over the head by two outlaws and moves in with a Dutch couple.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Classic comedy in which Hoss first meets prospector Obie and his lazy but allegedly brilliant mongrel dog, Walter.

programme.title: The Best Man
programme.desc: A writer (Taye Diggs) heads to New York to be best man at a friend's (Morris Chestnut) wedding, where he meets up with an old flame (Nia Long).

programme.title: Whoopi
programme.desc: A former singer (Whoopi Goldberg) runs a hotel in New York; the hotel's need for a concierge prompts Mavis to promote her handyman, Nasim (Omid Djalili).

programme.title: Whoopi
programme.desc: A terrorist threat alert makes Nasim paranoid about a briefcase left in the lobby, and Mavis gets jumpy too.

programme.title: Whoopi
programme.desc: A ferret bite sends Mavis to the emergency room, where the hospital staff ignores her; Nasim and Jadwiga fight for control of the check-in desk while the rest of the staff is away.

programme.title: Whoopi
programme.desc: Mavis receives a ticket for smoking, then urges Nasim to protest his citation for spitting in public.

programme.title: Just Wright
programme.desc: Leslie, a physiotherapist, falls for NBA star Scott while helping him recover. Scott loves Leslie's friend Morgan, who hides her real personality from him.

programme.title: The Tracy Morgan Show
programme.desc: Tracy and Alicia disagree about what to do when Derrick is caught shoplifting.

programme.title: The Tracy Morgan Show
programme.desc: Tracy takes over as coach of bench-riding Derrick's basketball team; Jimmy glues Alicia's diamond to his tooth.

programme.title: The Tracy Morgan Show
programme.desc: Tracy's pastor takes advantage of his offer of free repairs at the shop; Alicia pushes Derrick to try out for a solo in the choir.

programme.title: The Tracy Morgan Show
programme.desc: Tracy has the boys clean the garage to learn the value of money; Alicia returns to work after an old boss makes her an offer.

programme.title: Mann & Wife
programme.desc: Daniel and Michael go under cover to catch an art thief; Michelle visits and is excited to help DJ with a school assignment.

programme.title: Mann & Wife
programme.desc: Toni's cousin comes to visit after another break up but Lorraine sets her straight; DJ and Trey try to prove their masculinity by participating in a police ride along; Daniel and Michael fight for the Lieutenant's job.

programme.title: Mann & Wife
programme.desc: Tasha thinks she has healing powers when her goldfish dies and comes back to life; Michael's father comes to visit.

programme.title: Mann & Wife
programme.desc: Michael Hobbs falls in love with a woman and wants to move back to New York City with her; Terri doesn't feel that college is necessary to be successful.

programme.title: Mann & Wife
programme.desc: Lorraine loses a pearl necklace when the choir members come over for practice; after missing several date nights, Daniel is forced to take Toni on a date, which is actually a stakeout.

programme.title: Mann & Wife
programme.desc: Lorraine becomes extra nice when she suspects Daniel and Toni are putting her in a retirement home; Daniel and Michael give the Lieutenant some tips before his big date.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A woman with a history of emotional problems and drunken driving is involved in a girl's hit-and-run death.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: An interracial relationship between two teens stirs up strong emotions when the girl is shot in the back.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Tibbs (Howard Rollins) defends Parker against charges he assaulted an ex-girlfriend's (Victoria Jackson) fiancé.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: All the big stories and behind-the-scenes antics from the villa and Casa Amor, as narrator Iain Stirling reveals the very best unseen action from Week 4, including outtakes from when Maura Higgins played "Face Facts" with the Islanders.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Casa Amor ends; the Islanders must decide whether to stay loyal and maintain their current relationships or recouple with someone new; the girls confront the boys about what they saw in the video message.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Tensions reach a boiling point as the fallout from the recoupling leaves some Islanders torn over their decisions; friends rally around while Kay Kay and Kassy contemplate their relationships.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Carmen and Kenzo take to the water for their first date outside of the villa; the drama heats up as the Islanders attend "Movie Night" and find out what went on during Casa Amor.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The explosive movie night continues as the Islanders watch more clips from their time at Casa Amor; Sarah Hyland returns for an evening of savage dumping; the results of America's vote send shock waves through the villa.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The remaining results of America's vote are revealed; Sarah Hyland oversees the wildest dumping so far, leaving the Islanders in shock; the boys compete in a challenge for the title of "Mr. Quarterback"; a new bombshell rocks the villa.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Featuring antics from the islanders, as narrator Iain Stirling introduces unseen footage from all the challenges, dumpings and Beach Hut confessions from week five.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: New arrival Scott turns heads as he continues to get to know the single girls in the villa; the Islanders see whose pulses they can get racing as they put on sexy costumes to play "Hearts on Fire."

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The Islanders find out who raised whose heartbeat the most in the "Hearts on Fire" challenge; a girl is conflicted by her choices; the final recoupling leads to another dumping at the villa.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The boys are tasked with cooking dinner for the girls and head to a Fijian food market to buy ingredients; a surprise dumping leaves the votes in the Islanders' hands to decide which couple to send home.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: Following the departure of the couple voted least compatible, the remaining duos ponder about life outside of the villa; the Islanders receive video messages from home; emotions run high.

programme.title: Love Island
programme.desc: The remaining couples challenge their communication skills in a game of "Up-N-Down Diner"; Sarah Hyland returns with the results of America's vote, sending two duos packing and revealing the final four couples.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga los secuestros de niños cuyas madres presentan diversos problemas en St. Louis, Missouri. Por otra parte, Rossi se reencuentra con su primera mujer, que tiene impactantes noticias para él.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a California, donde en un bosque se han encontrado cuerpos ahogados. Mientras tanto, Rossi tiene que tomar una dura decisión con respecto a su exesposa.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS se sumerge en el competitivo mundo de los camiones de comida ambulante tras encontrar a un hombre congelado en la parte trasera de uno de ellos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre un círculo secreto de peleas de perros, lo cual lleva a un miembro del equipo a hacer un movimiento inesperado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Vance asigna a McGee, Torres y Bishop el cumplimiento de las medidas de protección frente al COVID en una cumbre de asuntos exteriores, donde descubren un vínculo con un caso de asesinato de otro equipo del NCIS.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La evidencia del apuñalamiento de un sargento de la Marina lleva a Torres a conocer a su padre, Miguel (Steven Bauer), quien le abandonó cuando era un niño.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez se apresuran a encontrar a una niña desaparecida que morirá en 72 horas sin su medicación para el corazón.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando Danny pide ayuda a su archienemigo encarcelado, Victor Lugo (Nick Cordero), para localizar a un criminal peligroso que escapó de prisión, Lugo acepta colaborar solo si puede unirse a la búsqueda.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Frank se enfrenta a una empresa de rastreo de datos cuando se niegan a desbloquear el teléfono de un terrorista que podría tener información sobre próximos objetivos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: En el final de la octava temporada, tras una serie de tiroteos mortales después de que seis hombres injustamente condenados fueran liberados, Danny y Baez se preguntan si los asesinatos fueron parte de un plan de venganza de los exconvictos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC investiga los secuestros de niños cuyas madres presentan diversos problemas en St. Louis, Missouri. Por otra parte, Rossi se reencuentra con su primera mujer, que tiene impactantes noticias para él.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: El equipo viaja a California, donde en un bosque se han encontrado cuerpos ahogados. Mientras tanto, Rossi tiene que tomar una dura decisión con respecto a su exesposa.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: En Kansas ha habido una serie de tornados donde han sido encontrados cuerpos de adolescentes desmembrados. La UAC es llamada para investigar. Mientras, JJ está preocupada, ya que su hijo Henry había estado enfermo y quería estar con él

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Un caso se vuelve personal para García cuando la UAC investiga la desaparición de una mujer, en su grupo de apoyo a sobrevivientes, cuya hija desapareció hace siete años.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect can’t stop huffing butane. Mistrust proves toxic after a dispute over slot machines. A puppy proves to be the magic charm with individuals who’ve hit a rough patch.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers conduct a routine traffic stop on a vehicle that ran a stop sign. Officers and residents systematically retrieve birds from a fireplace and release them outside. A police department conducts a drug-reversal-buy sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed 'Sketchy.' Some well-placed security cameras help reunite a man with his stolen bike.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A little rain doesn’t stop a determined quad driver from trying to outrun police. A deputy has doubts about a man’s professed distrust of banks. A man ignores obvious red flags when buying a moped and ends up paying the price.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A teenager who ran away from home tries running from the cops too. A man set a date to turn his life around, but deputies ask him to start earlier. A man found with hundreds of sunglasses claims he was going to give them away.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The passenger of a fleeing driver makes his own getaway, a motorcyclist in a high-speed pursuit narrowly misses a car, and police respond to a disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: Un despertar glorioso
programme.desc: Un presentador de la vieja escuela renuncia a su programa de noticias de mucho tiempo debido a las costumbres nuevas. Es reclutado por un productor estrella que quiere revivir un programa matutino endeble.

programme.title: Amigos con derechos
programme.desc: Un chico y una chica intentan mantener su relación estrictamente física, pero no pasa mucho tiempo antes de que aprendan que quieren algo más.

programme.title: Ghost: la sombra del amor
programme.desc: Patrick Swayze encarna a un fantasma que se alía con una psíquica (Whoopi Goldberg) para desenmascarar la verdad detrás de su asesinato y rescatar a su amor (Demi Moore) de un destino similar.

programme.title: El desafío de los siete magníficos
programme.desc: El jefe de 'Los Siete Magníficos' es ahora el sheriff de una pequeña ciudad. Cuando su 'tranquilidad' es destruida por el asesinato de su esposa, acepta una misión: rescatar a un grupo de mujeres de unos bandidos con la ayuda de cinco duros convictos.

programme.title: Los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Hombres armados son contratados para proteger un pueblo mexicano de un grupo de bandidos en esta adaptación de “Seven Samurai” de Kurosawa.

programme.title: El regreso de los siete magnificos
programme.desc: Protagonizada por Yul Brynner y con un reparto estelar que incluye a Robert Fuller, Warren Oates y Claude Akins, este western de aventuras sigue a los siete magníficos hasta México, donde se enfrentarán al duelo de sus vidas.

programme.title: Vuelven los siete magníficos
programme.desc: Un noble pistolero (George Kennedy) contrata a una brigada formada por los hombres más peligrosos del oeste para liberar a un líder revolucionario de los campesinos de una importante prisión mexicana en este clásico del oeste.

programme.title: El desafío de los siete magníficos
programme.desc: El jefe de 'Los Siete Magníficos' es ahora el sheriff de una pequeña ciudad. Cuando su 'tranquilidad' es destruida por el asesinato de su esposa, acepta una misión: rescatar a un grupo de mujeres de unos bandidos con la ayuda de cinco duros convictos.

programme.title: Asesinato en el Expreso de Oriente
programme.desc: El famoso detective Hércules Poirot está en el expreso de oriente, pero el tren queda atrapado en la nieve. Cuando se descubre que uno de los pasajeros ha sido asesinado, Poirot comienza a investigar inmediatamente.

programme.title: Toña machetes
programme.desc: La determinación de Lorena por darle un giro a su vida y escapar de un entorno decadente, hará que encuentre en la actuación un camino que le ayudará a descubrir sus talentos y habilidades.

programme.title: Único testigo
programme.desc: Cuando una joven Amish y su hijo se encuentran envueltos en el asesinato de un agente antinarcóticos encubierto, su salvador resulta ser el duro detective de Filadelfia John Book.

programme.title: Desapareció una noche
programme.desc: La desaparición de una niña en un peligroso vecindario de Boston, une a dos detectives privados con la policía en este fascinante misterio.

programme.title: Ojos de serpiente
programme.desc: En Atlantic City, un intento de asesinato lleva a un detective (Nicolas Cage) a investigar un caso de homicidio con 14.000 posibles sospechosos y una conspiración mortal en la que nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: Único testigo
programme.desc: Cuando una joven Amish y su hijo se encuentran envueltos en el asesinato de un agente antinarcóticos encubierto, su salvador resulta ser el duro detective de Filadelfia John Book.

programme.title: Atracción fatal
programme.desc: Michael Douglas interpreta a Dan, un abogado neoyorquino quien tiene un encuentro amoroso con la seductora Alex Forrest cuando su esposa no está. Dan luego termina el amorío por considerarlo un error, pero Alex no quiere ser ignorada...

programme.title: Doble traición
programme.desc: Una semana antes de Navidad, y después de pasar seis años en prisión, un expresidiario se ve obligado a participar en un atraco al casino.

programme.title: 13 ASESINOS
programme.desc: Un ingenuo joven adopta la identidad de un hombre muerto para unirse a un juego de mafiosos de ruleta rusa. Con Mickey Rourke, Jason Statham y Michael Shannon.

programme.title: Thelma y Louise
programme.desc: En una de las mejores películas de carretera de todos los tiempos, Geena Davis y Susan Sarandon, en su paseo de la fama eterno, se convierten en dos mujeres que se embarcan en una serie de crímenes por todo el suroeste de Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Una propuesta indecorosa
programme.desc: Demi Moore y Woody Harrelson son Diana y David Murphy, una pareja corta de dinero que apuesta a un viaje corto a Las Vegas que les dé una mano de suerte. Pero las probabilidades parecen más atractivas cuando el millonario John Gage sube la apuesta.

programme.title: Regreso a Cold Mountain
programme.desc: Una historia dramática de amor en los inicios de la Guerra Civil. Nicole Kidman, Jude Law y Renée Zellweger protagonizan esta película emotiva y atrapante del director ganador del Óscar Anthony Minghella (The English Patient).

programme.title: The Words (en Español)
programme.desc: Bradley Cooper, Dennis Quaid, Olivia Wilde y Jeremy Irons encabezan este thriller romántico sobre un autor que debe enfrentarse a la realidad de la ficción en una historia que nos mantendrá expectantes hasta el final.

programme.title: Arcángel
programme.desc: El profesor Fluke Kelso se encuentra con un misterioso anciano vinculado a Joseph Stalin.

programme.title: El embajador del miedo
programme.desc: Mientras toda la nación ve avanzar la campaña presidencial hacia las elecciones, un soldado corre contra el tiempo para descubrir una conspiración detrás de ella, una conspiración que podría destruir a la democracia misma.

programme.title: Gladiador
programme.desc: Traicionado por el imperio, un general romano cae en la esclavitud y se alza como gladiador para vengar a su familia. Dirigida por Ridley Scott y protagonizada por Russell Crowe, ganó 5 premios Oscar, incluido a mejor película.

programme.title: Pisando fuerte
programme.desc: Cuando se trata de imponer la ley, un solo hombre puede marcar la diferencia. Dwayne 'la Roca' Johnson no tiene piedad al hacer imperar la justicia y aplastar la corrupción en esta historia de un hombre que decide actuar para recuperar su ciudad.

programme.title: La cacería
programme.desc: El rastreador más famoso del FBI busca a un villano que asesina personas para ser el blanco de una cacería.

programme.title: Peligro en la montaña
programme.desc: Jason Momoa protagoniza este intenso thriller de acción sobre un leñador que lucha por sobrevivir contra los traficantes de drogas que han escondido heroína en su cabaña de caza.

programme.title: Gladiador
programme.desc: Traicionado por el imperio, un general romano cae en la esclavitud y se alza como gladiador para vengar a su familia. Dirigida por Ridley Scott y protagonizada por Russell Crowe, ganó 5 premios Oscar, incluido a mejor película.

programme.title: Venganza
programme.desc: Durante su permiso de libertad provisional, un convicto logra escapar de los guardias y planea su venganza contra aquellos que lo convirtieron en un asesino a sangre fría.

programme.title: Tirador
programme.desc: Decidido a probar su inocencia en una traición, Bob Lee Swagger se encuentra ahora en una tensa carrera contra todas las fuerzas de la ley de los Estados Unidos y contra una organización oscura que quiere verlo muerto.

programme.title: Yo, el halcón
programme.desc: Un título de campeón, un gran premio en metálico y el amor de su hijo: el premio más grande de todos, corren peligro cuando Hawk se enfrenta a su mayor enemigo por todo lo que siempre ha querido.

programme.title: La isla
programme.desc: Un hombre huye tras descubrir que en realidad es un “ser clonado”, y permanece junto a otros en un lugar único.

programme.title: Lo imposible
programme.desc: Nominada al Oscar (Mejor Actriz, Naomi Watts), este apasionante drama cuenta la increíble historia real de la supervivencia de una familia frente a probabilidades imposibles.

programme.title: Terremoto de San Andrés
programme.desc: Cuando una desacreditada sismóloga de Los Andeles advierte acerca de un inminente terremoto de 12.7, nadie la toma en serio. Sola, corre desesperadamente para poner a salvo a su familia antes de que el terremoto separe la ciudad del continente.

programme.title: Rugrats la película: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Con el nacimiento de su nuevo hermano Dylan, Tommy Pickles sabía que las cosas iban a cambiar, pero nunca esperó que ser un hermano pudiera ser tal aventura.

programme.title: El último maestro del aire
programme.desc: Aire, agua, tierra, fuego. Se enfrentan cuatro naciones atadas por el destino cuando el fuego inicia la guerra contra los demás. Atrapado entre la guerra, un Avatar descubre que es capaz de manipular los cuatro elementos.

programme.title: Un funeral de murte
programme.desc: Esta estrafalaria comedia británica nos muestra con un humor negro azabache la miríada de escandalosas calamidades que asuelan a un excéntrico clan inglés, que guarda unos cuantos muertos en el armario, cuando el patriarca muere inesperadamente.

programme.title: Cuatro bodas y un funeral
programme.desc: Charles y sus amigos, todos ellos solteros y sin compromiso, han llegado a una edad en la que casi todos sus conocidos se han casado. En una de las bodas, Charles conoce a Carrie, una americana de la que se enamora a primera vista.

programme.title: Nacho Libre
programme.desc: Jack Black encarna el papel más gracioso como Ignacio, un cocinero de monasterio que alimenta huérfanos de día y por las noches se transforma en Nacho Libre, un notorio luchador en calzas.

programme.title: Algo salvaje
programme.desc: Un ejecutivo conservador accede a viajar con una mujer alocada y excéntrica, que lo embarca en una estrafalaria odisea que trastocará el mundo de ambos.

programme.title: Lo que ellas quieren
programme.desc: Nick Marshall (Mel Gibson), un ejecutivo publicitario y soltero promiscuo, obtiene accidentalmente el poder de oír lo que piensan las mujeres. Nick decide usar su nuevo poder para sabotear a su jefa, Darcy (Helen Hunt), y avanzar en su propia carrera.

programme.title: GAMBIT (CBS FILMS)
programme.desc: Harry Deane (Colin Firth) is a man with a plan. Art Curator for media tycoon, Lord Lionel Shabandar (Alan Rickman), Harry devises an elaborate plot to con his abusive boss into purchasing a fake Monet painting.

programme.title: La mujer de mis pesadillas
programme.desc: Ben Stiller personifica a Eddie, el soltero empedernido de 40 años que finalmente da el "sí" a la hermosa Lila. Pero durante la luna de miel, la mujer de sus sueños resulta ser una completa pesadilla.

programme.title: Como agua para chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que el hombre que ella admira se case con su hermana, una joven mexicana le dedica su pasión a la cocina, descubriendo que puede transmitir sus emociones a través de las comidas que prepara.

programme.title: Como agua para chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que el hombre que ella admira se case con su hermana, una joven mexicana le dedica su pasión a la cocina, descubriendo que puede transmitir sus emociones a través de las comidas que prepara.

programme.title: Como agua para chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que el hombre que ella admira se case con su hermana, una joven mexicana le dedica su pasión a la cocina, descubriendo que puede transmitir sus emociones a través de las comidas que prepara.

programme.title: El crimen del padre Amaro
programme.desc: La política y las pasiones sexuales amenazan con corromper a un joven sacerdote recién ordenado en un pequeño pueblo mexicano.

programme.title: La virgen de agosto (LAS)
programme.desc: Eva decide quedarse durante agosto en Madrid, todo un acto de fe, para poder ver y sentir las cosas de otra manera y encontrar nuevas oportunidades.

programme.title: Compadres
programme.desc: Un policía mexicano y un joven americano hacker de computadores, unen fuerzas para entregar un criminal a la justicia en esta comedia de acción llena de altas emociones y risas escandalosas.

programme.title: Drácula 2000
programme.desc: El maestro del terror Wes Craven presenta una adaptación moderna y sexy del clásico thriller gótico. Luego de que Drácula despierta de su sueño de 100 años, su primer destino es Estados Unidos y la exótica ciudad de Nueva Orleans.

programme.title: Sabor a sangre y chocolate
programme.desc: Adaptación del relato de la autora Annette Curtis Klause acerca de una joven loba adolescente, que debe elegir entre su amor por un joven humano muy lindo y honrar la lealtad de la manada.

programme.title: San Valentín sangriento (2009)
programme.desc: Una nueva versión de la clásica película de terror de 1981 de George Mihalka, San Valentín sangriento tiene lugar diez años después de un devastador accidente en una mina de carbón con una serie de horribles asesinatos que atormentan a una pequeña ciudad.

programme.title: Drácula 2000
programme.desc: El maestro del terror Wes Craven presenta una adaptación moderna y sexy del clásico thriller gótico. Luego de que Drácula despierta de su sueño de 100 años, su primer destino es Estados Unidos y la exótica ciudad de Nueva Orleans.

programme.title: Jessabelle
programme.desc: Una chica se enfrenta cara a cara con un espíritu que, después de mucho tiempo de tormento, ha estado buscando su regreso.

programme.title: P2
programme.desc: Una mujer que es la última en salir de su oficina en la víspera de Navidad debe confiar en su ingenio para sobrevivir cuando está atrapada en un estacionamiento con un guardia de seguridad demente.

programme.title: Freeway (ESP)
programme.desc: Intentando huir de su vida, la delincuente juvenil adolescente Vanessa Lutz se va a vivir con su abuela. En su camino, conoce a Bob Wolverton, un asesino en serie encantador pero sádico.

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: A retired gunfighter, now a drifter determined to establish a peaceful life, comes to the aid of a homestead family threatened by a land barron and his hired gun.

programme.title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance
programme.desc: Jimmy Stewart plays the bungling but charming big-city lawyer determined to rid the fair village of Shinbone of its number one nuisance and bad man: Liberty Valance.

programme.title: Stagecoach
programme.desc: Dallas is a woman with a past who has been driven out of town by the high-minded ladies of the community. Lucy Mallory is the wife of a cavalry officer stationed in Lordsburg, and she's determined to be with him.

programme.title: McLintock!
programme.desc: The cattle rancher McLintock (John Wayne) puts his brand on the territory and every woman in it! Louise Warren plays a widow who moves with her two children onto McLintock’s ranch to serve as cook, while Maureen O’Hara plays the estranged wife.

programme.title: Last Of The Pony Riders
programme.desc: Gene Autry tries to set up a stage line to carry government mail. Schemers try to get the government assignment for their own stage line, and plan to discredit the Pony Express by causing accidents.

programme.title: On Top Of Old Smoky
programme.desc: Gene Autry, who is mistaken for a Texas Ranger, helps the owner of a toll road, while she is being pressured by bad characters to relinquish her property, which contains valuable mica deposits.

programme.title: The Kentuckian
programme.desc: Eli Wakefield (Burt Lancaster) and his son are Kentucky adventurers longing for life on the Texas frontier. They learn, however, that their greatest challenge lies not in the uncharted wilderness, but in the people they meet along the way.

programme.title: Five Guns To Tombstone
programme.desc: A reformed outlaw is living a clean life until his no-good brother who just escaped from prison ropes him into pulling a robbery. Now Billy has his own plan...to prevent it. And all he needs is his six shooters and a little luck.

programme.title: Wuthering Heights (1939)
programme.desc: Laurence Olivier, Merle Oberon and David Niven star in this adaptation of Emily Bronte's novel. When Cathy marries the aristocratic Edgar, her first love, Heathcliff, is determined to have revenge.

programme.title: West Side Story
programme.desc: Winner of ten Academy Awards including Best Picture, this electrifying musical sets the ageless tragedy of 'Romeo and Juliet' in the slums of 1950s New York and stars Natalie Wood, Richard Beymer, Russ Tamblyn, Rita Moreno, and George Chakiris.

programme.title: Romeo and Juliet
programme.desc: Italian director Franco Zeffirelli stunned the screen world when he cast two young unknowns to portray the star-crossed lovers in Romeo & Juliet, but it was a gamble that resulted in one of the most popular motion pictures of all time.

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine and Fred MacMurray are superb in this tale of love and ambition in the world of big business that went on to garner a Best Picture Oscar.

programme.title: Indiscreet
programme.desc: Cary Grant is the suave American diplomat who pretends to be married in order to preserve his bachelor status. Ingrid Bergman is the glamorous leading lady of the London stage who has no scruples about having an affair with a married man.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After years of substandard service, Oliver is hellbent on throwing the book at the Hooterville Phone Company. When it becomes clear that the local utility oversight board can't do much about it, he decides to handle matters directly.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Trendell, the president of the Hooterville Phone Company, hands the company over to a delighted Oliver. But after a day of crossed wires and a switchboard repairman with some loose connections of his own, Oliver is ready to call it quits.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: For the first time, Oliver has a successful crop that needs picking. His tomatoes have grown beautifully. But matters at the phone company continue to divide his precious time, so Oliver looks for an interested buyer to take the company off his hands.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Being president of the Hooterville Phone Company has been a rude awakening for Oliver. The switchboard operator is now calling him at five in the morning! After a bevy of new complaints from unhappy customers, Oliver has just about had enough.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: One might think that when Eb takes a vacation, things around the farm might go more smoothly. But when Eb elopes, leaving his cousin Walter to take his place, it turns out to be a horrible idea. Walter barely knows a weed from a hole in the ground!

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa is reminded that she stored a birthday present for Oliver years ago: a genuine Stavinsky. But what is it? It's a modern art sculpture that is two parts plumbing pipes, one part tire chains, and one part birdbath. Oliver calls it The Thing.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The continually evolving story of how Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Oliver) fell in love gets yet another version in this delightful episode. But one thing is for sure: Lisa and Oliver are just as in love today as the day when he fell out of the sky.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Green Acres is greener than ever…with jealousy. When Oliver (Eddie Albert) hires a handsome, young, intelligent Brit to take over his farm work while he is away, it doesn't take long for the newcomer to make a strong impression on Lisa (Eva Gabor).

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Mr. Haney is up to his money-making schemes again. When a government representative tells Mr. Haney that the state is looking to purchase the Douglas farm for a new highway, Mr. Haney arranges to buy back the farm from the Douglases at a steal.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Ralph, the lady carpenter, runs away from home and stays with the Douglases after having a fight with her brother, Alf. While Oliver may never get his bedroom finished, he gains a maid as Ralph takes over as the Douglases' live-in housekeeper.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Picking apples while on a picnic, Oliver runs into the feisty Ira Hatch, the owner of the apple orchard. However, once back in town, Mr. Drucker tells Oliver that Hatch has been dead for years. An incredulous Oliver agrees to see a psychologist.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After his elopement and cross-country honeymoon, Eb returns to Hooterville. But his new wife is nowhere to be found! After sending postcards from all across the country, Eb has to confess that his fiancé stood him up at the alter on their big day.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Someone has stolen $300 from Mr. Drucker's general store, and it looks like Eb is the culprit. How else could he have bought himself a new car that cost, you guessed it, exactly $300? But that is just the first twist of the many turns of this story.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa's dreams come true, and so do Oliver's nightmares, when Eb discovers a runaway boy sleeping in the hay in their barn. Lisa is only too excited about the idea of having the sounds of platters of little feet around the house.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Arnold, the Ziffels' television-loving pig, has taken on a paper route to save enough money for a new color set. But when bank robbers show up and threaten his dreams, and Lisa and Oliver are held captive in their own home, Arnold has to fight back.

programme.title: Taxi

programme.desc: The cabbies come to the rescue when Jim tries to convince his family that he didn't squander his inheritance by buying a run-down restaurant.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Bubba finds himself in trouble when he is in involved in an accidental shooting while on the job. The only witness is Virgil's Aunt Ruda, whose grudge against Virgil may work against exonerating Bubba. Can anyone convince her to do what is right?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A greedy slumlord in the Bottoms, Keen Philbrick, is notorious for the cruel and unfair treatment of his tenants, and his ownership of two drug dens. When he’s found murdered, Gillespie will need the help of savvy Bottoms informant, Jimmy Dawes.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Sparta police look into the murder of a wealthy invalid whose philandering husband is having an affair with a local beautician. All the evidence points to the beautician as the prime suspect, but she soon finds her own life is in danger.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night

programme.desc: A series of suspicious truck accidents on an old country road lead the Sparta police to a local drug ring. Gillespie and his team must find the dealer and put an end to the operation. Meanwhile, Virgil and Althea are at odds about taking a vacation.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Guest choreographers test the rookies with new routines, the veterans arrive at camp determined to earn back their spots, and country star Mickey Guyton has inspiring words for the hopefuls.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure's on for rookies and vets as the hopefuls head to the stadium for their first field rehearsal, and Kelli and Judy must decide which women won't move on in training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The rookies outshine the veterans when choreographer Travis Wall teaches a sexy dance number, and Kelli and Judy give some of the vets a wake-up call.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The dancers get a chance to showcase their unique talents during show group auditions, and Kelli and Judy deliberate with guest judges to select the elite squad.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The dancers test their ability to think on their toes during a series of mock-press interviews, and as auditions wind down, a shocking bit of news shakes up the process for Kelli and Judy.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy make cuts via video chat after a positive test for COVID-19 halts camp, Charlotte Jones hands out the iconic uniforms, and the team performs its game-day entrance.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As 51 rookies and veterans arrive to chase their dreams, the candidates hope to prove their talent with a standout solo performance and take on the kick line in the Judges' Showcase.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Melissa Rycroft comes to the first rehearsal to see which newbies have showmanship, DCC alum Natalie Woods hosts a rookie at her home, and Kelli and Judy make the first cuts of the season.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 47 hopefuls learn the mechanics of the kickline, a rookie's injuries put her out of commission, and choreographer Evan Miller teaches a dance routine that calls for power and precision.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: With nine cuts looming before the team's first game, the hopefuls show off their freestyle dancing, get fit for their official uniforms and learn new choreography from Denise Dicharry.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Choreographer Criscilla Anderson uses her cancer battle to inspire the dancers, veteran mentors offer style tips to the rookies, and Travis Wall helps Judy and Kelli make their next cut.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The hopefuls practice the highly precise entrance routine and jump kicks for the first time, Jordann shares a vulnerable personal story, and Judy and Kelli make two more tough cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the remaining ladies try out for the media-savvy Show Group, Judy and Kelli are faced with yet another difficult decision, and some dancers rise to glory while others' hearts are broken.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Makeovers give the dancers renewed confidence, alum Yuko shares exciting personal news, veteran Lisa makes a hard decision, and Kelli questions Alora-Rose about a rumored distraction.

programme.title: I Love New York: Do You Have Love For New York?
programme.desc: After getting her heart broken not once but twice, New York summons 20 single men to her mansion with the hope of finding true love. The guys think its one big party until New York's mom busts in through the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: The Mangeant
programme.desc: Chamo, NY's Assistant, calls the 15 guys to the backyard for a meeting. New York addresses them from her balcony – they will be competing in a male beauty pageant, a mangeant, and the winners will get dates with her.

programme.title: I Love New York: Big Ballers
programme.desc: The remaining 12 guys start their day with the usual trash-talking until Chamo delivers a New York Note.

programme.title: I Love New York: What's Up Dog
programme.desc: Chamo delivers a New York Note to the guys: it says that NY wants a man that is good with his hands. The remaining 9 guys will break up into 3 teams of 3 and build dog houses for NY's Chihuahua, Her Majesty.

programme.title: I Love New York: Who's Got Game
programme.desc: New York is down to her lucky 7 and wants to know which guys have skills on the court. She's lookin' for a baller.

programme.title: I Love New York: Momma Said Knock You Out
programme.desc: The 6 guys gather in the living room when New York tells them that they will be hosting a party for her girls while she goes shopping. The guys' excitement turns to terror when ten screaming 11-year-old girls run in the front door.

programme.title: I Love New York: Guess Who's Coming To Dinner
programme.desc: New York decides to do a background check on the remaining 5 guys so she invites their ex-girlfriends to a day at the spa. While the guys sweat it out at the mansion, their ex's give NY and her mom all the dirt they want to know.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.desc: To pay for armies and other costs, the ancient powers had to tax territories and monetise their assets. But in this world of commerce, ancient societies stored their wealth in different ways.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In a world where enemies watch for weakness, the ancient powers must use all their strength and cunning to defend their people, conquer new lands, and rise to the challenge of the battlefield.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: In an unruly world, the ancient powers must lead their people, create ways to govern and keep rebellion at bay. To achieve this, they may invent caste systems, organise gladiatorial games or turn to gods.

programme.title: Ancient Powers
programme.desc: Though the ancient powers have endured for centuries, their destruction is close at hand. However, some will leave lasting legacies that will continue to shape the world long after their downfall.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: In a time when monstrous creatures ruled the earth, South America was the land of the giants. Nigel Marven walks among these gigantic creatures, on a quest to witness the largest predator bringing down the largest prey.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Nigel Marven journeys back to the sand dunes of Mesozoic Mongolia to track the owner of the largest claws of all time, the Therizinosaurus. His adventure yields a series of surprising clues, a nest, footprints, dung, and more.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: Scientists study the perfectly preserved remains of an adolescent allosaurus they call Big Al.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: The Making Of: Walking With Dinosaurs

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: What's a father to do? When the cops ask Dog for help tracking down a renegade teen with a history of running hard, Baby Lyssa, eight months pregnant and counting, insists on joins the hunt. Can Dog keep his daughter safe and catch his man?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman is stabbed more than 100 times. The killer leaves DNA behind, but investigators must play a cat-and-mouse game to obtain a suspect's DNA to match.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Paul Gruber's daughter suspected something was wrong when she received birthday cards addressed from her father, but written in a stranger's handwriting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, young mother Tammy Tatum was sexually assaulted and murdered in her Longmont, Colorado apartment. Police initially suspected her estranged husband, but did not have enough evidence to charge him and the case went cold.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One morning in a deserted area outside of Phoenix, a motorcyclist discovers the body of a young woman. She had been beaten, bound, strangled and possibly raped. Nearby plants tell investigators more about the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2004, Rebecca Barney and her soon-to-be ex-husband Fred were found shot to death in their Tulsa, Oklahoma, home, which had been set on fire.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer was found dead in her bed with a plastic laundry bag near her face. Further investigation proved that the scene had been staged. Her death wasn't an accident — it was cold-blooded murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The prime suspect had a criminal record and his driver's license was found at the scene of a brutal double homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Firefighters find an entire family dead inside their home in an apparent murder-suicide, but there are several inconsistent clues in the rubble. Could ballistics, a time card and some secret audiotapes unravel the mystery?

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police discovered the body of Douglas Beamish's estranged wife, authorities linked 20 cat hairs found on her jacket to a cat owned by Beamish's parents. It was the first time animal DNA was used to solve a criminal case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While vacationing in California, Earl Morris learns that his wife has gone missing from their Arizona home. The search for Ruby Morris involves dozens of investigators and scientists — and even the Coast Guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A teenager went missing after an evening of horseback riding. Her body was found a month later, three miles from her home. But the killer unknowingly left trace evidence behind.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Haunted by the disappearance of her mother, a young woman undertakes an investigation of her own. In her mother's diary, she discovers a dark family secret that might explain the disappearance.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1993, the Amtrak Railroad experienced the deadliest train crash in United States history when the Sunset Limited derailed while crossing Alabama's Big Bayou Canot bridge. 47 passengers and crew were killed; scores more were injured.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: One warm summer afternoon, the town of Verona, Wisconsin faced its first triple homicide. To solve the case, investigators had to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A man disappears one year to the day after beginning an affair with his friend's wife. 15 years later, with the help of a metal detector, police find evidence that would prove what had happened and who was responsible.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: The wife of a respected police officer was murdered in her own home. The crime went unsolved for more than a decade, until a newly formed cold case unit took a fresh look at the evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: While investigating the apparent overdose suicide of Reverend Bill Guthrie's wife, detectives recover incriminating files from Bill's computer and learn of his infidelity.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, the body of young mother Summer Baldwin was found in a suitcase in a Texas landfill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman was found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas. The grass on that course was so distinctive, it had evidentiary value. The evidence led police to two suspects, each of whom blamed the other.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1986, Gary Dale Larson was stabbed to death in his Edmond, Oklahoma home. The killer then sexually assaulted Larson's girlfriend, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1996, a federal agency ruled that Terri Strickland had intentionally set the fire that killed her 17-month-old son, Josh Hinson. Using the then-emerging resources of the internet, Strickland undertook her own investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Lori Auker left her Pennsylvania home for work and never arrived, it took space-age technology, cat hairs and insects to pinpoint the woman's abductor.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A lifelong resident of the tiny town of Lefroy, Tasmania was murdered outside his own home. Robbery appeared to be the motive, but with no suspects, the investigation came to a halt.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When more than 700 Oregonians contracted food poisoning from a unique strain of salmonella in 1984, investigators uncovered a secret plot to influence local elections.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When the head chef of a historic Philadelphia restaurant was found dead, investigators interviewed the usual suspects: family, friends and coworkers. As they sifted through the evidence, police uncovered a chilling tale of debt and deceit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2000, Christina Sanoubane was murdered in her Cedar Rapids apartment after moving away from her abusive boyfriend. There are clues at the scene: bloody footprints and DNA from the victim's rape kit.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 6-year-old girl ran and hid when she saw her grandmother being beaten to death, but the man followed, beat and assaulted her. She said the assailant was her uncle, who was later convicted. She recanted her testimony years later.

programme.title: My Life Is a Lifetime Movie
programme.desc: A teacher is accused of being a sex offender; a woman is obsessed with her next-door neighbors.

programme.title: Taken in Broad Daylight
programme.desc: Teenager Anne Sluti (Sara Canning) is kidnapped by a madman, and by manipulating her captor, she manages to negotiate her safe release after six days.

programme.title: A Dangerous Date
programme.desc: Introduced to online dating, a single father learns the dangerous pitfalls of trusting someone too early when he meets the perfect woman.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Acompaña a Little Angel en sus divertidas aventuras. Desde paseos en camión hasta misterios con calcetines, zapatos apestosos, magia con helados, rugidos de dinosaurios, la hora de dormir y los superpoderes de mamá: ¡un día de diversión e imaginación!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Únete a Little Angel en un divertido viaje lleno de chapuzones sobre la natación segura.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: ¡Sumérgete en un día lleno de emociones con Little Angel! Desde campamentos y aventuras piratas hasta visitas al zoológico, competencias de castillos de arena, aventuras heladas y la alegría navideña, ¡cada aventura es un tesoro de alegría y risas!

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Bienvenido al mundo de los pequeños modales, donde los Little Angels enseñarán valiosas lecciones de amabilidad, empatía y buenos modales.

programme.title: Little Angel (LAS)
programme.desc: Prepárate para acompañar a los Little Angels en un viaje de coraje y valentía, en el que aprenderán a enfrentarse a nuevos retos con una sonrisa y con confianza.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The Ingalls family, returning from a trip to the city, is stopped by a U.S. marshal looking for a Sioux renegade.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A farm boy (Mitch Vogel) takes Mr. Edward's tales to heart and heads to the big city.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Founder's Day festivities promise fun and friendly competition for all except aging logger Jim Tyler, who fears losing the log chopping contest to a younger Charles Ingalls.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When a company that owes money to Charles becomes bankrupt, Charlies ends up deep in debt and puts a lot of financial strain on the family.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mary's failing eyes end up causing issues with her schoolwork; when Charles gets her glasses, her class begins to tease her for them.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura Ingalls is stunned to learn that her fishing friend is Walnut Grove's new banker; she gets upset when he accuses her of befriending him to secure a loan.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: The town gathers for a baseball match between the Green-Stockings of Sleepy Eye and the men of Walnut Grove.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura decides to find out for herself if a hermit (John Anderson) is really a maniac.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura and Widow Snider (Bonnie Bartlett) scheme to get dates for the spring dance.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A dying widow (Patricia Neal) asks the Ingalls to help find homes for her children.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: When it appears the widow's children must be separated, Mr. Edwards makes an announcement.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Mrs. Oleson complicates the Ingallses' long-awaited camping vacation by deciding that she and her family should go along.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura thinks she has found gold and imagines the glamorous life it can buy.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura and Mary's plans to raise money for the pastor's birthday by investing the Sunday-school funds backfire.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Isaiah Edwards attempts to bond with his newly adopted son and buys him a rifle so that the pair can go hunting together; his son, an avid reader, has no interest in hunting.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A voice-recording device broadcasts Laura's love for a new boy (Eric Shea) all over town.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: After playing with "Stop" and "Go" signs with Angela, Baby Bop leaves to direct some traffic of her own! Meanwhile, in the caboose, Barney and the kids enjoy a costume parade, a game of "Musical Stop & Go," and some very vigorous body movement.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The kids have put together a "Caboose Color Collection" which showcases the primary colors—red, yellow and blue. Barney and Baby Bop enjoy songs and games suggested by the colorful objects.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are surprised to learn that playing games and having fun in the park is great exercise. Baby Bop is happy to learn that not only is she exercising while she plays, but exercise will make her grow big and strong.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids are excited because five of Mr. Boyd's brass-playing buddies are putting on a show in the park tonight! Angela is learning to play the trumpet and knows that it takes a lot of practice. BJ arrives and the group visits the caboose.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney has fun with his friends every day, there's something special about making a brand NEW friend! When Mr. Boyd's niece, Colleen visits the park, she's eager to make friends with the other kids...but being the "new kid" isn't easy.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Tony shares a box full of numbers that he made with his dad. He is showing them off when a gust of wind blows them all away. Barney and the kids decide to go on a number hunt. They soon find Baby Bop and their hunt takes the group all over the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Angela is in the park to release her turtle after observing him with her classmates in school. Barney and the children discuss the meaning of in and out after observing the turtle going in and out of his shell.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's a rainy spring day, and the children can be found inside painting and creating. Barney arrives, explains the differences amongst the seasons, and suggests playing outside in the rain. The rain is soon replaced by sunshine and a rainbow.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's always fun to share a day with Barney—but it's also important to learn how to "play it safe!" Baby Bop, wanting to be a good helper, has been attaching adhesive strips to her frustrated (and uninjured) brother, BJ.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and his friends play hopscotch—with a twist. Whitney is learning about triangles at school, so Angela created Triangle Hopscotch to help reinforce "triangles."

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: It's the day of the bike parade. But Nick has had a bike accident that leaves his bike in need of repair by Mr. Boyd. Barney helps Baby Bop and the children learn all about bicycles—and that they are a wonderful way to exercise and have fun.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Beth has invented a brand-new holiday called "Happy Day," in which everyone gets to make a wish for something which will make them happy—and everyone else tries to make that wish come true! Barney and the kids discuss feelings and facial expressions.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children are invited to a family picnic in the park, but don't know who invited them. The invitations instruct them to bring a family treasure, so each child has something special with them. Barney helps lead a discussion about families.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: A "too hot" afternoon becomes a "totally cool" day when Barney introduces his friends to the wonders of water.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Although the park may be a home away from home for Barney and his friends, BJ wants to build his own "totally awesome, completely cool" house. While BJ works on his house, Barney and the children learn all about houses and homes.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: While Barney and the children wait for Mr. Boyd's new fountain to be delivered, they have fun playing in and exploring the park.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney, Baby Bop and the kids learn all about “on” and “off” by playing games together.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children bring toys to donate to Mr. Boyd's toy drive. Baby Bop and BJ arrive and after some convincing, Baby Bop learns about the merits of sharing.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Miss Jo loses her cat, Barney and the children spend the day helping her find it. Along the way, they learn all about cats.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Mario is trying to write his very own fairy tale. The children help by acting out some of their favorite fairy tales to give Mario some ideas.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Throughout the day, Barney and the children learn about "hot" and "cold," but the fun really begins when Barney turns the playground into a winter/summer wonderland!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: When Sarah accidentally spills red paint into the blue paint, a mess turns into a perfectly purple day. The children paint pictures, make purple flowers and plan a purple party for their friend Colleen.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: With a little Barney magic, the children experience the differences between day and night!

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: The children learn all about the piano when they play games, listen to real pianos and even play a little themselves.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: After a brief misunderstanding, BJ realizes he has many friends. He enjoys a day playing with Barney and the children.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney and the kids help Baby Bop count to ten by playing games, and visiting a Make-Believe Market.

programme.title: Barney & Friends
programme.desc: Barney helps Baby Bop and the children discover big and little things in the world around them. And by the end of the day, the kids have learned that big or little, they're all wonderful just the way they are!

programme.title: Shania Twain: Empowerment
programme.desc: Considered as The Queen of Country Pop, she is one of the best-selling artists of all time, having sold over 85 million records. Her album ‘’Come on Over’’ being the best-selling album by a female artist and the top-selling country album of all.

programme.title: Dolly Parton: Big Hair, Bigger Heart
programme.desc: No royal beginnings for this Queen of Country Music. Known for her larger-than-life positive attitude parading big hair and bold make-up, Dolly Parton would carved out her own identity as a singer, movie actress, and entrepreneur.

programme.title: Sabrina Carpenter, Tucker Wetmore, Lukas Nelson
programme.desc: Sabrina Carpenter, Tucker Wetmore and Lukas Nelson take the stage from the Opry House in Nashville.

programme.title: Dolly Parton: Queen of Country
programme.desc: Dolly Parton is the most honoured female country performer of all time. She has had 25 songs reach No1 on the Billboard Country charts, a record for female artists. She has 41 career top 10 country albums, a record for any artist.

programme.title: ABBA: Super Troupe
programme.desc: Few bands have been able to dominate the industry in the same way as ABBA. Follow their journey to celebrity stardom, through archival interviews and performances from ABBA, with added inside knowledge from leading industry professionals.

programme.title: Madonna: Goddess of Pop
programme.desc: Madonna is a global mega star and one of the most recognizable music icons in history. Her phenomenal career has spanned four decades, selling more than three hundred million records worldwide.

programme.title: Olivia Newton John: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: Olivia Newton-John amassed three Grammys and eight American Music Awards.

programme.title: Pussy Riot: A Punk Prayer
programme.desc: Three young women face seven years in a Russian prison for a satirical performance in a Moscow cathedral. But who is really on trial in a case that has gripped the nation and the world beyond, three young artists or the society they live in?

programme.title: The Beatles Explosion
programme.desc: See the early days of the Beatles with rare interviews, newsreels, press conferences, and television appearances.

programme.title: The Decline Of Western Civilization
programme.desc: The Los Angeles punk music scene circa 1980 is the focus of this film. With Alice Bag Band, Black Flag, Catholic Discipline, Circle Jerks, Fear, Germs, and X.

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta

programme.title: Love & Hip Hop: Atlanta

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: La manada más salvaje

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: De la broma a la guerra
programme.desc: La tablet manda a Ana e Isaac a una cita romántica y Leslie tambalea. La sala tornado abre sus puertas y sus vientos traen muchas dudas. Lizbeth y Diana planean una broma que no termina nada bien. La llegada del próximo ex podría ser devastadora.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: El tiburón tiene colmillo
programme.desc: Los nuevos ex abren las puertas a más problemas. Diana se pone malacopa y amarga la fiesta más dulce. Un tiburón de dos patas visita la villa y lo que parecía un chiste termina siendo una verdadera amenaza. La primera Love Suite es para...

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Shots con sentimiento
programme.desc: La llegada de Michelle hace arder la villa. La sala tornado pone de cabeza los sentimientos de Leslie. Christian inicia la llama del amor con Andrea mientras que Diana provoca una explosión.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: No soportas, ¿verdad?
programme.desc: Lalo viene a terminar los pendientes con Leslie y a Isaac le toca atacarse. Lizbeth explota contra Isaac y Rufas. Yurgenis se libera en un catamarán, sin la sombra de Brandon. El nuevo ex llega muy salsa, pero de la que no pica.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: El jaque mate
programme.desc: Ana saborea el plato de la venganza, mientras que Leslie se limpia las lágrimas con su orgullo. Un divertido día de playa se convierte en una pesadilla. La llegada del nuevo ex cambia el juego y La Divaza tira los dados cuando no es su turno.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Veo, veo y no veo claro
programme.desc: La Divaza decide quién debe abandonar la villa. Carolina no controla su ira y le desacomoda las extensiones a Yurgenis. Isaac respeta su condición y va por su próxima conquista. La tablet del terror desata una nueva oleada de discusiones.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Aquí se arma la de cantina
programme.desc: Leslie e Isaac se hacen novios. Una discusión provoca que Lizbeth le moje las pestañas a Ali y se desate la guerra. El nuevo ex se lleva la sorpresa de encontrarse con dos ex-amores. Rufas tiene las llaves de la Love Suite.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Los demonios bailan en la villa
programme.desc: Rufas le rompe el corazón a Carolina. A Jey le toca escena de celos doble. La sala tornado sopla todos los chismes de Brandon. El lobo está enjaulado mientras que Yess le hace piojitos. Una fiesta empieza bien y termina con la llegada de un ex.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: Efectos instantáneos
programme.desc: Yess se dio tragos hasta encontrar el más amargo. Los bandos tratan de encontrar la paz, pero solo tratan. Isaac ya no puede forzar la máquina y termina a Leslie. Unas pócimas mágicas llenas de alcohol hacen efecto inmediato en los influencers.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP: ¡Que viva la toxicidad!
programme.desc: Lizbeth y Ali dan los votos a su amor tóxico, mientras que los salvados dan sus votos a la soltería. La Love Suite se abre por última vez con un trío muy caliente.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP
programme.desc: 10 influencers llegan a sus vacaciones en el caribe, pero la "Tablet del Karma" les recuerda que deben saldar cuentas con sus Ex. Asaf elige a Lilian para su corazon.

programme.title: La Venganza de los Ex VIP

programme.desc: El cachorro de los Finster está aletargado y los bebés creen que es porque aún no le dieron un nombre. / Una amiga de Betty viene de visita con su hija Alice, justo cuando los reportes climáticos predicen un huracán, también llamado Alice.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Hugo, Chas, Angélica y Susie ingresan a sus mascotas a un concurso para disputarse el premio de “Mejor Mascota”. / Taffy lleva a los bebés a su primera visita a un restaurante de comida rápida.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Cuando los bebés acompañan a sus mamás a la venta anual para bebés, los Rugrats creen que serán vendidos. / Los bebés hacen un bebé de nieve y lo llaman Steve.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Tommy pierde la paciencia luego de resbalarse en un juego, y Angélica desafía a los bebés a pruebas de valor para ver quién es el más “valiente”. / Didi lleva a los bebés a la universidad. Ellos se escapan y viven una aventura en el campus.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica convence a los bebés de que los papás están buscando la fuente de la juventud para volver a ser niños. / Para el cumpleaños de Kimi, sus padres organizan una fiesta especial, pero Hugo lleva a los bebés a un club gótico.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: En el primer cumpleaños de Tommy, él y sus amiguitos deciden que quieren ser perros. Creyendo que comiendo la comida de su mascota se convertirán en perros, ellos comandan a una nave a control remoto para conseguirla.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Angélica tira la pelota favorita de Tommy al otro lado de la valla durante un picnic. Stu y Didi llevan a Tommy a una cena de negocios.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Los niños van al cine y causan estragos. Tommy sueña que su familia se transforma en figuritas que cuelgan sobre su cama.

programme.title: Rugrats: aventuras en pañales
programme.desc: Fili y Lili son los protagonistas de un comercial de pañales. Ellos enojan al personal y destruyen el estudio tan querido del director. Didi lleva a Tommy a la escuela donde enseña economía del hogar.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato están descansando en el jardín cuando se encuentran con Lola Caricola, que se muda al árbol que tienen en el jardín. / Perro y Gato trabajan como empresa de catering en una lujosa fiesta en una mansión de Nearburg.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: El automóvil de Perro y Gato se rompe y se ven obligados de llevarlo al taller de Lube. / Perro encuentra la vieja cámara de Gato y pasea por todo Nearburg tomando fotografías de personas en situaciones vergonzosas.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro y Gato se tropiezan con un plató de cine, y se convierten en dobles. / Perro y Gato convencen a Lola de infiltrarse entre los Grasosos para conocer sus hábitos y encontrar sus debilidades.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Tito se tropieza con los perros Groseros en la calle cantando Doo Wop. Los reúne con Perro y Gato y forman un grupo de canto para convertirse en súper estrellas. / Lola Caricola tiene que hacer un documental sobre Gato y Perro.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Nearburg se convierte en tierra invernal y Perro y Gato, Lola, Dunglap, Mervis y los perros Grasosos aprovechan la oportunidad para pasear en trineo por la nieve. / Perro obtiene un equipo de hipnosis de juguete.

programme.title: CatDog
programme.desc: Perro construye su propio Camión de Monstruos y arrastra a Gato hasta la plaza de Nearburg para participar del Rally de camiones de monstruos. / Lola convence a Perro y Gato de producir miel en el jardín.
